title: Scotch Broth
body:
Classic Sunday-night supper. Even better the next day; the barley thickens it into stew.

· 2 lb lamb neck or shoulder, bone-in
· 10 cups water
· ½ cup pearl barley
· 1 large onion, diced
· 2 carrots, diced
· 1 turnip, diced
· 1 leek, sliced
· Salt and pepper
· Chopped parsley to serve

source.label: Mrs. Isabella Beeton · Book of Household Management · 1861
